onboarding.title: Creator Onboarding
onboarding.youAreLiveDesc: Your profile is now published in the marketplace. Share your link to get discovered.
onboarding.handleInvalid: Only letters, numbers, hyphens and underscores (3–30 chars).
onboarding.handleHint: This will be your @handle and profile link. Lowercase letters, numbers, - and _. 3–30 characters.
onboarding.whatsappInvalid: Enter a valid number in international format starting with +
onboarding.whatsappHint: Required. International format with country code (e.g. +971 for UAE). We use this for booking notifications.
onboarding.bioPlaceholder: Tell brands about yourself, your niche, and what you do best...

blogger.title: Blogger / Influencer
blogger.description: Content creator with an engaged audience

ugc.title: UGC Creator
ugc.description: Raw video content for brand ads

editor.title: Video Editor
editor.description: Professional video editing, color grading, and post-production

onboarding.tgChannelUrlHint: Public link to your Telegram channel (t.me/...).
onboarding.legalHint: Recommended for official advertising in the UAE.
onboarding.statsOptionalHint: Audience stats are optional for this role. Your portfolio and skills matter more — you'll set those up in the next steps.
onboarding.photoRequired: Profile photo is required to continue.
onboarding.trustedByHint: Upload brand logos you have previously worked with. This builds trust with new advertisers.
onboarding.logoFormats: PNG or SVG on transparent background preferred. Max 2MB each.
onboarding.portfolioHint: Upload up to 12 photos or videos (max 50MB each)
onboarding.profilePreviewDesc: This is how your card will appear in the marketplace
onboarding.checkSocialLink: At least one social link added
onboarding.publishWarning: By publishing, your profile becomes visible to brands and clients. You can edit or unpublish at any time from your dashboard.

model.heightRequired: Height is required for model profiles.
model.ageRequired: Age is required for model profiles.
model.nationalityRequired: Nationality is required for model profiles.
model.socialHint: For models, only an Instagram link is needed. Audience stats are not required — your portfolio speaks for itself.
model.minHoursHint: Minimum number of hours per booking.
model.shootTypesPlaceholder: e.g. Commercial, Fashion, Catalog, Events, Lookbook
model.shootTypesHint: Comma-separated list of genres you work in.
model.restrictionsPlaceholder: e.g. No lingerie, no alcohol brands, no political content
model.restrictionsHint: Specify any types of work you will NOT accept.
model.portfolioHint: Upload up to 10 professional photos to showcase your look and versatility.
model.photoLimit: Max 10 photos. JPG, PNG, or WebP. Max 5MB each.

marketplace.heroSubtitle: Guaranteed safety for brands and creators. Find top bloggers, UGC creators, and models. Hire videographers and photographers. Advertise in the best Telegram channels, on websites, and radio. Strict selection — we onboard only verified professionals.
marketplace.heroSubtitle_kz: The best bloggers, UGC creators, and models in Kazakhstan and CIS. Safe deals, vetted professionals, transparent pricing.
marketplace.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, niche, or location...

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.briefPlaceholder: Describe your product and campaign goals...
checkout.sslNotice: Your payment is secured with 256-bit SSL encryption

success.title: Payment in Escrow!
success.desc: Funds are frozen on the platform account. The creator will receive them only after you press
success.creator: Creator
success.notice: When the work is done, you will receive a notification and can track your order in «My Orders».

orders.title: My Orders
orders.emailHint: Enter the email you used when placing the order. When the work is ready — press «Accept Work» to release funds to the creator.
orders.noOrdersHint: Make sure the email matches what you entered at checkout.
orders.escrowFrozen: Funds are frozen in escrow. Click the button below when the work is done and you are ready to accept it.
orders.workAccepted: Work accepted. Funds have been sent to the creator.

cta.title: Are you a blogger, model or UGC creator?
cta.desc: Join our marketplace and start earning from brand deals. Set your own prices, manage bookings, and get paid.

escrow.title: Secure Transaction — Platform Guarantee
escrow.step1Desc: Funds go to the platform account and are frozen. The creator cannot access them yet.
escrow.step2Desc: While the creator works, your money is safely held in our account.
escrow.step3Desc: Press "Accept Work" — only then are funds released to the creator.

landing.hero: THE OPERATING SYSTEM FOR CONTENT IN DUBAI.
landing.premiumDesc: Curated high-ticket content systems for Brokers & Developers.
landing.portfolioSub: Content that reaches millions and converts audiences into clients
landing.appReceivedSub: We'll reach out via Instagram within 24 hours.
landing.yourGoalPlaceholder: I want to scale content for my real estate brand...

calendar.taskPlaceholder: What are we filming? Topic, wishes...
calendar.errorBook: Could not book. Please try again.
calendar.whatsappInvalid: Please enter full number: +971 XX XXX XXXX
calendar.loginDesc: Authentication lets you track and manage your sessions
calendar.pickDateHint: Select a date to view available time slots

booking.cancelWarning: The slot will become available for other clients. This action cannot be undone.
booking.rescheduleNoSlots: No available slots for this date
booking.rescheduleError: Could not update time. Please try again.

dashboard.title: My Account
dashboard.noBookingsSub: Book a session in the "Calendar" section
dashboard.ctaTitle: Required: Add your link to Instagram Bio
dashboard.ctaDesc: Your profile will NOT receive orders until you add this link to your Instagram Bio description. This is a mandatory step to start getting bookings.

progressHints.addPackages: Set up at least one package

model.skillsPlaceholder: e.g. Driving, Dancing, Sports, Swimming, Yoga
model.skillsHint: Comma-separated list of your professional skills.
model.featuresHint: Any notable physical attributes that may be relevant for casting.
model.videoCompHint: Upload a short video introduction (max 50MB). This will be shown prominently on your public profile.

bnpl.infoSubtitle: Interest-free · No hidden fees · Available in UAE
bnpl.step1: Choose Tabby or Tamara at checkout instead of a card.
bnpl.step2: Enter your Emirates ID or phone number for a quick identity check.
bnpl.step3: Get instant approval — no paperwork, no bank visit.
bnpl.step4: Pay the first instalment now. The rest is split automatically over the next weeks.
bnpl.req1: UAE resident or visitor (Emirates ID / Passport)

cd.finishOnboarding: Complete your creator onboarding to access the dashboard.
cd.noOrdersDesc: When brands book your services, orders will appear here.
cd.noPackagesHint: Set up packages in the Packages tab
cd.noPortfolioHint: Upload your best work in the Portfolio tab
cd.packagesDesc: Create service packages that brands can book directly.
cd.ugcPricingHint: Set your base price for the service. The system will automatically add 20% to the price displayed to clients on the storefront. Packages help brands book you directly.
cd.bloggerPricingHint: Create service packages (e.g. 'Reels Ad Integration' or 'Post + Stories') so brands can book them directly. Note that the platform automatically deducts a 20% commission from the price you set.
cd.noPackagesExample: Add your first package to start receiving orders.
cd.portfolioDesc: Upload photos and videos to showcase your best work.

wallet.desc: View your earnings and manage payout details.
wallet.fillBankFirst: Please fill in your bank details first.
wallet.ibanHint: UAE format: starts with AE followed by 21 digits.
wallet.ibanHintKz: Enter 16-digit card number or IBAN starting with KZ.
wallet.ibanInvalid: IBAN must start with AE (UAE format).

packages.model_desc_placeholder: e.g. Commercial shoot, up to 3 outfits

promo.ugc_desc: Record a short UGC review about Yalla Influencers. Tell your audience how we connect brands with creators in Dubai. Post it on your page, keep it for at least 20 days, and add your profile link to your Bio.
promo.ugc_desc_kz: Record a short UGC review about Yalla Influencers. Tell your audience how we connect brands with creators in Kazakhstan. Post it on your page, keep it for at least 20 days, and add your profile link to your Bio.
promo.modal_subtitle: Paste the link to your published video
promo.success_desc: Your link has been sent for moderation. Funds will be credited to your balance after verification.

brand.noMessagesDesc: Messages from creators will appear here once you place an order.
